versioning_policy.major: breaking schema, generation, release, dual approval, secure file, replacement/revocation, courier handoff, permission or API change
versioning_policy.minor: new backward-compatible material type, file type, report, screen, template field or workflow extension
versioning_policy.patch: bug fix, validation update, copy/config correction
versioning_policy.material_package_versioning: Every generated package has immutable package_version and active_version flag.

_meta.generator_note: Semantic compiled module spec; not a CSV-row wrapper.
